backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Left2Lift platform, defining data types (FoodDonation, NGO, Volunteer, UserProfile) and state maps, seeding initial NGO data, and including authorization and blob-storage mixins with data migration support.
backend/migration.mo: Data migration module that transforms the old actor state by converting user profiles from a text `role` field to a typed `entityType` variant, defaulting all existing profiles to `#hotel`.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (login pages, dashboards, etc.) to their source files, component dependencies, test IDs, and confidence levels for build verification.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference document for the project's frontend structure.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes, covering colors, borders, charts, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React SPA with the page title set to "Left2Lift – Maharashtra Edition" and a root div mounting point for the Vite/React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application file that sets up TanStack Router with all page routes, provides Language and EmergencyMode contexts, renders the navigation bar with role-based links, and exports shared context hooks.
Reusable React component that animates a numeric counter from zero to a target value using requestAnimationFrame with an ease-out cubic curve, displaying an icon, label, and optional suffix.
frontend/src/components/AssignmentCard.t: Displays a volunteer delivery assignment card showing food type, pickup/delivery locations, distance, and countdown timer with urgency styling, plus buttons to mark a donation as picked up or delivered.
frontend/src/components/DarkModeToggle.t: A small button component that toggles between dark and light mode using the ThemeContext, displaying a Sun or Moon icon accordingly.
frontend/src/components/DonationCard.tsx: Renders a food donation card with safety status, distance, priority label, and accept/reject action buttons, with emergency mode highlighting support.
A fixed top banner that appears when emergency mode is active, displaying an animated alert message to mobilize volunteers.
frontend/src/components/EmergencyModeTog: A toggle button that activates or deactivates emergency mode, changing its appearance and label based on the current emergency state.
Displays a food safety status badge (safe, urgent, or unsafe) with an appropriate icon and label, supporting both compact and full display modes.
frontend/src/components/GlassCard.tsx: A reusable glassmorphism-styled card wrapper component with optional hover animation and click handler support.
frontend/src/components/LanguageToggle.t: Renders a segmented button group for switching between English, Hindi, and Marathi languages using the LanguageContext.
frontend/src/components/LocationBanner.t: A dismissible informational banner that indicates results are being filtered by the user's current location.
Displays AI-matched NGOs for a donation, highlighting the best match with distance and estimated pickup time, followed by up to two additional ranked matches.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog for first-time users to set up their profile by entering their name, city, and role, then saving it via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/RoleGuard.tsx: A route guard component that redirects unauthenticated or unauthorized users to the appropriate login page based on their role, showing a spinner while loading.
Renders a route preview card showing pickup and delivery locations with distance/time stats and an embedded OpenStreetMap iframe between two lat/lon coordinates.
frontend/src/components/SkeletonCard.tsx: Displays an animated placeholder skeleton card with pulsing blocks to indicate loading state for a content card.
frontend/src/components/ToastContainer.t: Renders a fixed bottom-right stack of toast notifications with type-specific icons, slide-in animation, and a progress bar that auto-dismisses after a configurable duration.
frontend/src/components/VolunteerAssignm: Displays a card showing an assigned volunteer's name, rating, distance, ETA, and an urgency message for a food pickup task.
frontend/src/contexts/EmergencyModeConte: Provides a React context for toggling emergency mode, persisting the state to localStorage and applying an 'emergency-mode' CSS class to the document root.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: Provides a React context for multi-language support (English, Hindi, Marathi) with a translation lookup function that falls back to English, persisting the selected language in localStorage.
frontend/src/contexts/ThemeContext.tsx: Provides a React context for dark/light theme toggling, persisting preference in localStorage and syncing the 'dark' CSS class on the document root.
frontend/src/contexts/ToastContext.tsx: Provides a React context for managing toast notifications with show/remove functions, auto-dismissal via setTimeout, and typed toast levels.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCountdownTimer.ts: Custom hook that computes a live countdown from an expiry timestamp, returning remaining time text, percentage, and urgency level/color updated every second.
frontend/src/hooks/useGeolocation.ts: Custom hook that retrieves the user's current GPS coordinates via the browser Geolocation API, exposing loading, error, and permission-denied states.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profiles, food donations, NGOs, volunteers, and impact counters, wrapping actor calls with caching and mutation invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useRoleBasedAccess.ts: Hook that derives the current user's app role (hotel, ngo, volunteer, admin, guest) from their profile and returns permission flags and redirect paths for role-based UI control.
frontend/src/hooks/useTextToSpeech.ts: Hook wrapping the Web Speech SpeechSynthesis API to provide speak/stop controls with speaking state and error handling, defaulting to en-IN locale.
frontend/src/hooks/useVoiceInput.ts: Hook wrapping the Web Speech Recognition API (including webkit prefix) to capture voice input transcripts with start/stop controls, error state, and an optional callback.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter/Poppins fonts, sets up Tailwind layers, defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light/dark/emergency themes, and declares reusable component classes like glass-card.
frontend/src/locales/translations.ts: Defines English (and presumably other language) translation strings organized by feature namespace (nav, home, donate, ngo, volunteer, impact, admin) for the app's i18n system.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminAnalytics.tsx: Admin analytics page that aggregates donation, NGO, volunteer, and impact data into summary metric cards, a city-activity bar chart, and a 30-day activity chart.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLogin.tsx: Admin login page using Internet Identity authentication that checks for an existing user profile and either redirects to the admin dashboard or prompts the user to set up an admin profile with a name.
frontend/src/pages/DonateFood.tsx: Food donation form page that collects food details, computes food safety status, matches nearby NGOs, submits donations to the backend, and allows donors to rate NGOs after pickup.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page displaying animated impact counters, city-level stats, a how-it-works section, and voice-command navigation support for routing users to key app sections.
frontend/src/pages/HotelDashboard.tsx: Hotel/donor dashboard showing the user's food donations with status badges and summary stats (total, pending, accepted, picked up), plus navigation to the donation form and impact page.
frontend/src/pages/HotelLogin.tsx: Hotel/restaurant login page using Internet Identity that redirects existing users to the hotel dashboard or prompts new users to enter their organization name to create a hotel-type profile.
frontend/src/pages/ImpactDashboard.tsx: Displays a real-time impact dashboard with charts (bar, donut, line) showing meals saved, people fed, CO2 reduced, city breakdowns, donation status, weekly trends, and a donor leaderboard. Includes a text-to-speech accessibility feature that reads out a summary of the impact metrics.
frontend/src/pages/LoginLanding.tsx: Renders a landing page where users select their role (Hotel, NGO, Volunteer, or Admin) to be routed to the appropriate login page. Each role is displayed as a styled card with an icon, description, and navigation action.
frontend/src/pages/NgoDashboard.tsx: Provides the NGO dashboard for viewing and managing pending food donations, showing food safety status, distance/pickup time estimates, and priority badges. NGOs can accept or reject donations, with emergency mode highlighting urgent items.
frontend/src/pages/NgoLogin.tsx: Handles Internet Identity authentication for NGO users, redirecting existing profiles to the NGO dashboard or prompting new users to set up an organization name. Includes login, logout, and profile creation flows.
frontend/src/pages/VolunteerDashboard.ts: Shows available food donations for volunteers to claim, with live countdown timers, food safety status, distance calculations, and urgency-based styling. Volunteers can claim pickups, with emergency mode surfacing the most critical items.
frontend/src/pages/VolunteerLogin.tsx: Volunteer login page using Internet Identity authentication that handles new user profile setup (name entry) and redirects authenticated volunteers to the volunteer dashboard.
frontend/src/utils/cityCoordinates.ts: Defines coordinates for Maharashtra cities and provides a `getNearestCity` function that uses the Haversine formula to find the closest city to given lat/lng coordinates.
frontend/src/utils/foodSafetyEngine.ts: Computes food safety status (safe/urgent/unsafe) based on food type, cook time, storage condition, and city climate, returning remaining hours and a descriptive message.
frontend/src/utils/haversine.ts: Provides a Haversine distance calculation between two lat/lng points in kilometers and a helper to estimate pickup time in minutes based on distance.
frontend/src/utils/ngoMatcher.ts: Matches and ranks NGOs against a donor's location using a weighted urgency score combining remaining food hours, proximity, and NGO capacity.
frontend/src/utils/routeOptimizer.ts: Optimizes a volunteer pickup route by sorting donations by cook time (most urgent first) and computing cumulative distances and estimated arrival times from a starting position.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/src/utils/volunteerMatcher.ts: Finds the best matching volunteer for a donor location by scoring candidates on a weighted combination of distance and volunteer rating.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, extended border radii, box shadows, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks the project's current state including version, architectural notes, known issues, and a list of implemented features for the multi-entity authentication platform.
